arts.ttl: Leny Yoro Manchester United injury news latest as return date target 'set'
arts.sum: Man United have been without Leny Yoro for almost two months now after the teenager fractured the fifth metatarsal on his left foot during their pre-season tour

arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Premier League clash between West Ham and Chelsea as we provide you with all the build-up, team news and live action from the London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘convinced’ injury-hit star will succeed
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has said he is ‘convinced’ that Mason Mount will be a success at Manchester United following a difficult start to his career with the club. Mount endured an injury-hit debut season following his £55m arrival from Chelsea in 2023, with the midfielder restricted just five starts in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Ten Hag confident new Manchester United signing will be ‘very good’
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is confident that Manuel Ugarte will be a ‘very good player’ for Manchester United as the midfielder adapts to the Premier League. Ugarte signed for Manchester United from Paris Saint-Germain for a fee in the region of £51m on deadline day, as Ten Hag sought to add strength to his midfield options. arts.ttl: Manchester United star's role less clear than ever despite Erik ten Hag 'trust'
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has more options than ever in midfield which may impact how much Mason Mount plays after returning from injury despite starting the season strongly

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool make Haaland enquiry; Man Utd consider Gomes reunion
arts.sum: Liverpool and PSG have reached out to Erling Haaland over a future move, but the striker would prefer to head to Barcelona if he leaves Manchester City. Liverpool could rival Newcastle for Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, who seems unlikely to sign a new contract at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup
arts.sum: Manchester United look to continue the momentum of back-to-back wins when Erik ten Hag’s team travel to face Crystal Palace on Saturday evening. After the disappointment of a heavy defeat to Liverpool before the international break, the Red Devils have regrouped impressively with comprehensive wins over Southampton and Barnsley. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United – Match Preview
arts.sum: The venue for Saturday evening’s kick-off is Selhurst Park this weekend, as Crystal Palace entertain Manchester United under the lights. Both sides progressed into the fourth round of the Carabao Cup in midweek, with United thrashing League One outfit Barnsley 7-0 and Palace narrowly edging out Queens Park Rangers.
